input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule VE.3.3.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ve.3.3.2
            TITLE: underclothing

            CONTENT:
            rule VE.3.3.2: Underclothing
VE.3.3.2 Underclothing 
All competitors should wear fire retardant underwear (long pants and long sleeve shirt) under 
their approved Driver Suit.

final_answer: rule VE.3.3.2: Underclothing VE.3.3.2 Underclothing All competitors should wear fire retardant underwear (long pants and long sleeve shirt) under their approved Driver Suit.
